checklist.description: Compares retrieval before and after consolidation using the same representative task prompt
checklist.name: Same prompt check

checklist.description: Uses compile or search behavior as the verification surface instead of a generic success statement
checklist.name: Compile or search

checklist.description: Checks whether ranking or entry selection becomes more stable or sensible after consolidation
checklist.name: Ranking stability

checklist.description: Checks whether retrieval now connects incidents to relevant fixes or decisions more clearly
checklist.name: Incident-to-fix path

checklist.description: Checks whether contradictions are surfaced rather than silently merged away
checklist.name: Contradiction visibility

checklist.description: Checks for less irrelevant same-topic retrieval after consolidation
checklist.name: Noise reduction

checklist.description: Documents any remaining uncertainty or follow-up work instead of declaring the batch complete unconditionally
checklist.name: Open risks

context: Tests whether the agent verifies consolidation quality against retrieval behavior rather than treating relation creation as success by itself.
